Container.Name: cashpilot
Container.Overview: CashPilot is a self-hosted passive income orchestrator. Deploy, manage, and monitor bandwidth-sharing, DePIN, storage, and GPU compute Docker containers from a single web dashboard. Tracks earnings across 49 services with historical charts and trend analysis. [br][br] This is the UI container. It provides the web dashboard, earnings collection, service catalog, and fleet management. It does NOT require Docker socket access. [br][br] [b]You also need the CashPilot Worker container[/b] on each server where you want to deploy passive income services. The worker manages Docker containers and reports back to this UI. [br][br] Set the same CASHPILOT_API_KEY on both the UI and all workers to authenticate them. [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/CashPilot
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: passive income bandwidth sharing earnings money
Container.Requires: CashPilot Worker container (cashpilot-worker) for container management

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the CashPilot web dashboard

Config.Name: API Key
Config.Description: Shared API key for worker authentication. Must match the key set on all CashPilot Worker instances.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Encryption key for stored service credentials (Fernet). Auto-generated if left empty.
